system.Text:
When you **take significant time to perform an activity that fights the darkness within you** roll +heart and change any challenge die result that is below your darkness level to your darkness level. You may not Cleanse the Darkness if you are Shaken.

On a **strong hit**, the darkness retreats. Lower your darkness and choose one:
* Lower your darkness again.
* Take +1 momentum.

On a **weak hit**, the darkness loosens its grip. Lower your darkness once.

On a **miss**, the darkness clings to you. Mark Shaken.

You may not Wield the Darkness to Interrupt this move.

Trigger.Text: When you take significant time to perform an activity that fights the darkness within you

Strong Hit.Text:
Lower your darkness and choose one:
    * Lower your darkness again.
    * Take +1 momentum.
